deterministic-no-llm-selection.description: TIER_0 deterministic task resolves via the synthetic NO_LLM candidate.

zero-cost-local-selection.description: A zero-cost local reference entry wins over a paid alternative when both satisfy requirements.

low-cost-text-selection.description: A low-cost text-generation reference entry is preferred once it satisfies every requirement.

structured-output-selection.description: A structured-output-capable reference entry is selected when the task requires schema-shaped output.

long-context-selection.description: A long-context reference entry is selected once its declared window covers the estimated unit volume.

advanced-reasoning-selection.description: An advanced-tier reference entry is selected when the task requires above-standard reasoning quality.

high-risk-advanced-selection.description: A HIGH-risk task only accepts an ADVANCED-or-above reference entry, enforced by the task profile contract.

premium-only-eligible-selection.description: The premium reference entry wins because the cheaper standard entry does not meet the minimum quality bar.

budget-blocked-selection.description: The only candidate exceeds the maximum declared cost ceiling and is filtered out (BUDGET_BLOCKED).

privacy-blocked-selection.description: The only candidate declares a weaker privacy tier than required and is filtered out (PRIVACY_BLOCKED).

unavailable-model-selection.description: The only candidate declares itself unavailable and is filtered out (AVAILABILITY_BLOCKED).

unknown-pricing-selection.description: The only candidate declares an unknown cost tier and is filtered out (BUDGET_BLOCKED).

capability-mismatch-selection.description: The only candidate lacks the required capability and is filtered out (CAPABILITY_BLOCKED).

context-limit-selection.description: The only candidate has too small a context window for the estimated unit volume (CONTEXT_BLOCKED).

tenant-mismatch-selection.description: The only candidate is bound to a different tenant and is filtered out (TENANT_BLOCKED).

organization-mismatch-selection.description: The only candidate is bound to a different organization and is filtered out (ORGANIZATION_BLOCKED).

tie-breaker-selection.description: Two candidates tie on every criterion; the canonical model_id ordering breaks the tie deterministically.

fallback-plan-selection.description: A second eligible candidate is captured declaratively as a fallback plan entry, never executed.

escalation-plan-selection.description: A third eligible candidate is captured declaratively as an escalation plan entry, never executed.

no-eligible-candidate-selection.description: No candidate meets the minimum quality bar and NO_LLM is disallowed, so no eligible candidate remains.
